results.name: United States
results.key_finding: ADJUDICATED-UNLAWFUL-CONDUCT-IS-SCORABLE. Federal courts ruled core fast-track / third-country deportation policy UNLAWFUL (Judge Murphy Feb 25; Judge Cobb D.D.C.) -- a Tier-5 finding, not an allegation -- alongside the 17th ICE in-custody death of 2026 (~1 per 6 days) with detention EXPANSION 'despite record deaths' (ACLU), two U.S.-citizen fatal shootings by federal officers with official victim-blaming, and National Guard to five cities. Defensible multi-dimension downgrade (ACC 1.9->1.4, EMP/INT 1.9->1.5, EQU 1.7->1.4, BND 2.3->2.0) reaches -5.9, clearing the 5-point threshold with a Developing->Critical band crossing. Distinguished from filed-but-unadjudicated 3M/UnitedHealth/CVS by the actual judicial findings.

results.name: 3M Company
results.key_finding: Confirm-with-watch at 20.3 (0.3pt above Critical). TWO sovereign PFAS suits in one month -- Australia $1.43B (largest-ever Australian claim; 28 contaminated bases; alleges risk-information withheld) and Minnesota MPCA (PFOS 310,000 ppt vs 0.05 ppt standard; discharge 'continues to this day' despite the 2018 $850M settlement; 3M asserts military-contractor immunity). Raises sovereign-enforcement density and reveals AB2/AB4 recurrence + AB1 deflection, BUT the new harm is filed-but-unadjudicated and 3M has ADJUDICATED prior reparation ($850M MN, A$408M AU) that holds ACC above the floor. Disciplined modeled downgrade -2.3 (would cross Developing->Critical but SUB the 5-point threshold). Boundary case; no proposal.

results.name: Yemen
results.key_finding: Floor confirmation at 0.0. UNSC June 6 unanimous demand to release 73 UN staff detained by the HOUTHI movement (~2 years on; 22.3M+ in need). ATTRIBUTION ruling: harm perpetrated by a non-state armed group controlling territory within the failed-state Yemen, encoded by the existing active-perpetration/conflict-driven 0.0 floor. Already at absolute floor (harm-flag override); reinforces, cannot move lower; no proposal possible.

results.name: Iran
results.key_finding: SCALE-FLOOR confirm at 2.5. June 1-2 executions of January-uprising protesters (Maleki/Mohammadinia June 1; Avari June 2); ~37 political prisoners executed since March 19 (~1/49h); imminent risk to Naghdi and the Amiri brothers. Deepens a single dominant extremity already priced; does not meet the multi-category 0.0 threshold. Escalation reinforces; no movement below the floor-adjacent anchor.

results.name: Oracle Corporation
results.key_finding: Boundary confirm at 20.6 (0.6pt above Critical). June 15 sign-or-forfeit WARN deadline (~30,000 workers) materializes an already-priced layoff. WARN-avoidance theories + WA/MO/NJ WARN remain FILED-BUT-UNADJUDICATED, not scorable. Adverse WARN adjudication would likely push into Critical.

results.name: Democratic Republic of Congo
results.key_finding: Near-floor confirm at 2.3. NATURAL-DISASTER-OVERLAY-NON-DOUBLE-COUNT re-affirmed: Ebola Bundibugyo (381/64; PHEIC; no vaccine; Uganda spread) + ~26.5M concurrent hunger are an exogenous shock revealing priced incapacity, no documented deliberate state obstruction. Disambiguation re-confirmed (composite-2.3 entity, rank 181, NOT Republic of Congo at 20.3 rank 148).

results.name: UnitedHealth Group
results.key_finding: Confirm-with-watch at 10.2. AZ AG June 1 8-insurer + MultiPlan price-fixing cartel suit adds to converging sovereign enforcement (DOJ probe, MA AG $100M MassHealth suit). Raises density and corroborates a decade-long upcoding pattern but remains filed-but-unadjudicated; reinforces not reveals the near-floor profile. Modeled aggressive downgrade -2.0, sub-threshold. Prior-auth pledge announced-not-verified.

results.name: Russia
results.key_finding: Floor confirmation at 0.0. Continued active perpetration of the war on Ukraine. Absolute floor (harm-flag override); reinforces, cannot move lower.

results.name: CVS Health
results.key_finding: Confirm at 25.6. AZ AG June 1 price-fixing cartel suit adds to the priced 340B $250M diversion suits + AI-copyright matter; all filed-but-unadjudicated, reinforce not reveal the near-floor ACC 1.75/EQU 1.75 profile. Not independently scorable pre-adjudication.

results.name: Sudan
results.key_finding: Floor confirmation at 0.0. 33.7M need; 19.5M food insecure; Darfur famine areas; SAF/RSF. CONFLICT-DRIVEN-FAMINE-AT-FLOOR; reinforces, cannot move lower.

results.name: South Sudan
results.key_finding: Floor confirmation at 0.0. 7.8M (56%) food insecure; 73,300 IPC Phase 5; four counties at famine risk; SAF/SPLM-IO access denial. CONFLICT-DRIVEN-FAMINE-AT-FLOOR.

results.name: Afghanistan
results.key_finding: Floor confirmation at 0.0. Codified gender persecution (Decrees 12/18). UNAMA mandate June 17 is an external-process milestone, not a conduct change. Absolute floor; cannot move lower.

results.name: Myanmar
results.key_finding: Floor confirmation at 0.0. June 1 airstrikes on IDP camps while residents slept; 5.2M displaced. ICC arrest-warrant application is an external accountability process, not a conduct change. Absolute floor; reinforces.

results.name: xAI/Grok
results.key_finding: Floor confirmation at 0.0. Pentagon $200M classified access (MILITARY-AI-BY-CONTRACT floor), Warren safety demands, documented harmful outputs reinforce the floor. Cannot move lower.

results.name: Nigeria
results.key_finding: PRICED-CONTINUATION confirm at 21.9 (1.9pt above Critical). ~34.7M projected lean-season food-insecure; ~3.5M IDPs (~10% of African displacement); NE Boko Haram/ISWAP + NW banditry. Dominant drivers are NON-STATE armed groups against a low-capacity state, already encoded in the baseline; no documented deliberate state obstruction of aid. Converts on state-attributable mass harm or famine confirmation. Boundary watch; no proposal.

results.name: Sao Tome and Principe
results.key_finding: Rotation confirm at 48.4 (no acute news event). Stable Functional; EQU 2.5 single laggard. Reconstruction exact; no math-hygiene flag.

results.name: Kiribati
results.key_finding: Rotation confirm at 39.1 (no acute news event). Climate-displacement pressure is priced continuation. Stable Developing. Reconstruction exact; no math-hygiene flag.

results.name: Marshall Islands
results.key_finding: Rotation confirm at 41.4 (no acute news event). Climate-displacement + nuclear-legacy pressures priced; ACT/EQU 2.4 laggards. Reconstruction 41.9 vs 41.4 (diff 0.50 -- AT the boundary, NOT > 0.5; not flagged; validator silent).

results.name: Nauru
results.key_finding: Rotation confirm at 25.0 (no acute news event). Offshore-processing / small-state capacity concerns priced; EQU 1.5 laggard. Reconstruction exact; no math-hygiene flag.

results.name: Tuvalu
results.key_finding: Rotation confirm at 48.4 (no acute news event). Climate-displacement + Falepili-mobility pressures priced; EQU 2.5 laggard. Reconstruction exact; no math-hygiene flag.

carry-forward; June 15 sign-or-forfeit deadline + any adverse WARN-avoidance / WA-MO-NJ WARN adjudication would likely push into Critical

data_hygiene_flags.note: Disambiguation re-confirmed: composite-2.3 entity (rank 181, 'Democratic Republic of C') = DRC, NOT Republic of Congo (rank 148, composite 20.3).

Reconstruction 41.9 vs published 41.4 = diff exactly 0.50. The math-hygiene rule flags only diffs > 0.5; this is AT the boundary and NOT flagged. validate-indexes.mjs is silent on this entity. Carry-forward as published 41.4.

data_hygiene_flags.slug: russia / sudan / south-sudan / afghanistan / myanmar / xai-grok / yemen
data_hygiene_flags.note: Published at the absolute 0.0 floor (all dimensions 1.0, harm-flag override). New adverse evidence reinforces but cannot move the floor; no proposal possible. Yemen ADDED to the floor-cohort list this cycle for the Houthi-attribution ruling.

methodology_rulings.ruling: The 2026-06-04 U.S. immigration-enforcement signal differs categorically from the filed-but-unadjudicated corporate matters carried this cycle (3M, UnitedHealth, CVS) because it rests on actual TIER-5 JUDICIAL FINDINGS of unlawful conduct: Judge Brian Murphy (D. Mass., Feb 25 2026) struck down third-country deportations without notice/recourse as a due-process violation, and Judge Jia Cobb (D.D.C.) barred expedited removal of port-of-entry parolees. Combined with the 17th ICE in-custody death of 2026 (~1 per 6 days) and ACLU-documented detention EXPANSION 'despite record deaths' (an AB2 correction-refusal at adjudicated tier), two U.S.-citizen fatal shootings by federal officers with official victim-blaming (AB1/E4 deflection at the highest evidentiary tier), and National Guard to five cities, the baseline 23.4 (which priced a punitive-but-contested posture) is shown to under-price ACC/EQU/EMP/INT harm. Defensible multi-dimension downgrade (ACC 1.9->1.4, EQU 1.7->1.4, EMP 1.9->1.5, INT 1.9->1.5, BND 2.3->2.0; AWR/ACT/SYS held) reaches -5.9, clearing the 5-point change-proposal threshold with a Developing->Critical band crossing. Change-proposal written (status pending).

Two SOVEREIGN PFAS suits in one month -- Australia's largest-ever government claim ($1.43B; 28 contaminated bases; alleges 3M WITHHELD risk information) and the Minnesota MPCA suit (PFOS 310,000 ppt vs a 0.05 ppt standard; discharge 'continues to this day' despite the 2018 $850M settlement; 3M asserts military-contractor immunity and seeks federal removal) -- raise sovereign-enforcement DENSITY and reveal AB2/AB4 recurrence + AB1 deflection. RULING: the NEW harm is filed-but-unadjudicated (newly-filed civil complaints, no liability/settlement), AND 3M has ALREADY made ADJUDICATED/SETTLED reparation ($850M MN 2018; A$408M AU community settlements) -- an AB5 reparative-action signal that sits ABOVE the absolute floor and does NOT support flooring ACC to 1.0. A disciplined modeled downgrade (ACC 1.5->1.25, INT 1.5->1.25, EMP 2->1.75) reaches -2.3 -- which WOULD cross Developing->Critical but is SUB the 5-point threshold. Distinguished from the U.S. case (no adjudicated NEW-harm finding here). Boundary case, carry-forward; converts to scorable on adverse adjudication/settlement of either suit or rejection of the military-immunity defense.

The UNSC June 6 unanimous demand to release 73 UN staff is directed at detentions perpetrated by the HOUTHI (Ansar Allah) movement -- a non-state armed group controlling territory in northern Yemen -- not by the internationally-recognized government. RULING: the harm is conduct by one warring party within the failed-state Yemen territory, the kind of in-territory armed-actor harm the existing active-perpetration / conflict-driven 0.0 floor already encodes. The country entity aggregates all in-territory actors at the floor. Already at the absolute 0.0 floor (harm-flag override); reinforces, cannot move lower; no proposal possible. Watch: verified detainee release + humanitarian-corridor opening would be a first improvement signal.

~34.7M projected lean-season food-insecure, ~3.5M IDPs (~10% of all African displacement), NE Boko Haram/ISWAP (5.9M in need), NW banditry (2,938 kidnapped Jul-2024-Jun-2025), and Middle-Belt conflict are severe but a CONTINUATION picture. The dominant drivers are NON-STATE armed groups and chronic structural fragility already encoded in the 21.9 baseline (EQU 1.5/EMP 1.75/SYS 1.75 laggards). Absent documented deliberate state obstruction of humanitarian access (the Sudan/South Sudan distinguishing factor), the June 2026 figures REINFORCE rather than REVEAL new state-attributable mass-harm. Confirm at 21.9; boundary watch (1.9pt above Critical). Converts on state-attributable mass harm or famine-area confirmation.

Re-affirmed at floor-adjacent 2.5. June 1-2 executions of January-uprising protesters; ~37 political prisoners executed since March 19 (~1/49h); imminent risk to Naghdi and the Amiri brothers. Deepens a single dominant extremity already priced; does not meet the multi-category absolute-0.0 threshold. Escalation reinforces; no movement below the scale-floor anchor.

Re-affirmed. The AZ AG June 1 8-insurer + MultiPlan price-fixing cartel suit adds to converging sovereign enforcement against UnitedHealth (DOJ probe, MA AG $100M MassHealth suit) and names PBM-affiliated insurers relevant to CVS; with the priced CVS 340B $250M diversion suits and Oracle WARN-avoidance/WA-MO-NJ WARN matters, all remain filed-but-unadjudicated and reinforce rather than reveal near-floor profiles. UnitedHealth modeled aggressive downgrade -2.0 (sub-threshold). Oracle June 15 sign-or-forfeit deadline materializes an already-priced layoff (no new score). UnitedHealth prior-auth pledge announced-not-verified, non-creditable.

Re-affirmed. Russia (continued active perpetration of the war on Ukraine), Myanmar (June 1 airstrikes on IDP camps; ICC arrest-warrant application is an external process, not a conduct change), Afghanistan (codified gender persecution via Decrees 12/18; UNAMA June 17 is an external milestone), and xAI/Grok (Pentagon $200M classified access; documented harmful outputs) are at the absolute 0.0 floor (harm-flag override). New adverse evidence reinforces but cannot move the floor; no proposal possible.

Re-affirmed. Sudan (33.7M need; 19.5M food insecure; Darfur famine areas; SAF/RSF) and South Sudan (7.8M/56%; 73,300 IPC Phase 5; four counties at famine risk; SAF/SPLM-IO access denial) sustain the active-perpetration 0.0 floor via state-attributable constrained humanitarian access. Already at absolute floor; escalation reinforces.

Re-affirmed. Ebola Bundibugyo (381/64; PHEIC; no vaccine; Uganda spread) + ~26.5M concurrent hunger are an exogenous shock revealing already-priced state-response incapacity, absent documented deliberate state obstruction. Near-floor 2.3; no double-count. Disambiguation re-confirmed.

framing_corrections.correction: The published 23.4 (Developing) priced a punitive-but-legally-contested immigration posture. The 2026-06-04 evidence supplies the missing ADJUDICATED element (courts ruling the policy unlawful) plus record-pace in-custody deaths and citizen fatalities, moving the entity from confirm to scorable downgrade (23.4 -> 17.5, Developing -> Critical). This is the cycle's only change proposal and the clearest demonstration of the adjudicated-vs-filed boundary.

The published ACC 1.5 / INT 1.5 already price chronic PFAS accountability deficits; the two new sovereign suits raise enforcement density and reveal ongoing-discharge recurrence, but as filed-but-unadjudicated new harm against an entity with adjudicated prior reparation, the defensible movement (-2.3) is sub-threshold. Leading corporate reassessment trigger if either sovereign suit reaches merits/settlement or the military-immunity defense is rejected.

top_3_most_consequential_findings.finding: The cycle's only change proposal and a NEW methodology ruling: ADJUDICATED-UNLAWFUL-CONDUCT-IS-SCORABLE. Federal courts ruled core fast-track / third-country deportation policy UNLAWFUL (Murphy, Cobb) -- a Tier-5 judicial finding, not an allegation -- alongside the 17th ICE in-custody death of 2026 (~1 per 6 days) with detention EXPANSION 'despite record deaths', two U.S.-citizen fatal shootings by federal officers with official victim-blaming, and National Guard to five cities. Defensible multi-dimension downgrade reaches -5.9 (23.4 -> 17.5), clearing the 5-point threshold with a Developing -> Critical band crossing. This is the cycle's authoritative demonstration that adjudicated unlawful-conduct findings are scorable where filed-but-unadjudicated allegations are not.

The clearest filed-but-unadjudicated boundary test of the cycle: TWO sovereign PFAS suits in one month -- Australia's largest-ever government claim ($1.43B; alleges risk-information withheld) and the Minnesota MPCA suit (PFOS 310,000 ppt vs 0.05 ppt; discharge continuing 'to this day' despite the 2018 $850M settlement; 3M asserts military-contractor immunity). RULING: filed-but-unadjudicated NEW harm + ADJUDICATED prior reparation ($850M MN / A$408M AU) that holds ACC above the floor -> disciplined downgrade -2.3, which WOULD cross Developing->Critical but is sub-threshold. Boundary case, no proposal; strongest corporate reassessment trigger on any merits/settlement.

Floor confirmation with an ATTRIBUTION ruling: the UNSC June 6 unanimous demand to release 73 UN staff targets detentions by the HOUTHI movement (a non-state armed group controlling territory), not the recognized government. The harm is in-territory armed-actor conduct already encoded by the active-perpetration / conflict-driven 0.0 floor. Already at the absolute floor (harm-flag override); reinforces, cannot move lower; no proposal possible.

3m (BOUNDARY 0.3pt above Critical: adverse adjudication/settlement of the Australia $1.43B or Minnesota MPCA suit, or rejection of the military-contractor immunity defense -> scorable ACC/INT/EMP downgrade into Critical)

unitedhealth-group (LEADING corporate trigger: merits adjudication/settlement of ANY of the converging sovereign actions -- DOJ MA-billing probe, MA AG $100M MassHealth suit, AZ AG price-fixing cartel suit -> scorable downgrade; VERIFIED prior-auth delivery -> potential upgrade)

russia / sudan / south-sudan (verified ceasefire + humanitarian-corridor opening -> first improvement signal; further escalation reinforces floor)

rotation set (sao-tome / kiribati / marshall-islands / nauru / tuvalu: stable; reassess on any acute event)
validator_notes: validate-indexes.mjs run: 12750 checks passed, 0 errors, 128 warnings. NONE of the 128 warnings falls among the 20 entities assessed this cycle (warnings are unrelated entities -- e.g. Vermont, Minnesota[state], Houston, Texas, and band-boundary informational notices on cities/states). No math-hygiene flag for any assessed entity.

All 20 assessed baselines reconstruct via computeCompositeFromDimensions: EXACT (diff 0.00) for Iran 2.5, Oracle 20.6, DRC 2.3, UnitedHealth 10.2, CVS 25.6, 3M 20.3, United States 23.4, Nigeria 21.9, Russia/Sudan/South Sudan/Afghanistan/Myanmar/Yemen 0.0, xAI 0.0, and rotation Sao Tome 48.4 / Kiribati 39.1 / Nauru 25.0 / Tuvalu 48.4. Marshall Islands reconstructs to 41.9 vs published 41.4 (diff exactly 0.50) -- AT the boundary, NOT > 0.5, so NOT a math-hygiene flag; validator silent. No simple-mean false positives flagged.

ONE change-proposal written this cycle: united-states (23.4 -> 17.5, -5.9, Developing -> Critical; status pending). Seven floor confirmations (Russia, Sudan, South Sudan, Afghanistan, Myanmar, xAI, Yemen). Three boundary cases carry-forward (3M -2.3, Oracle, Nigeria). UnitedHealth -2.0 / CVS / DRC / Iran confirmed.
ONE band crossing (united-states, via change proposal). THREE boundary cases flagged (3M 20.3, Oracle 20.6, Nigeria 21.9).
DRC disambiguation re-confirmed (composite-2.3 entity, rank 181, NOT Republic of Congo at 20.3 rank 148).
No change-proposals other than the single 2026-06-04 united-states proposal were created or modified. The existing backlog and pending items were left as-is. Published index JSON not modified.
methodology_version_signal: v1.2 sustained. NEW this cycle: ADJUDICATED-UNLAWFUL-CONDUCT-IS-SCORABLE (united-states; Tier-5 judicial findings of unlawful conduct + record-pace deaths cross from confirm to scorable downgrade, -5.9, the cycle's only proposal), FILED-BUT-UNADJUDICATED + ADJUDICATED-PRIOR-REPARATION (3m; new-harm allegation non-scorable while settled prior reparation holds ACC above floor -> disciplined -2.3 sub-threshold), ATTRIBUTION-NON-STATE-ACTOR-AT-FLOOR (yemen; Houthi-perpetrated detentions encoded by the existing floor), PRICED-CONTINUATION/NON-STATE-DRIVEN (nigeria; insurgency/banditry harm priced, boundary watch). Re-affirmed: SCALE-FLOOR (iran), FILED-BUT-UNADJUDICATED sovereign-enforcement density (unitedhealth/cvs/oracle), ACTIVE-PERPETRATION-FLOOR (russia/myanmar/afghanistan/xai), CONFLICT-DRIVEN-FAMINE-AT-FLOOR (sudan/south-sudan), NATURAL-DISASTER-OVERLAY-NON-DOUBLE-COUNT (drc).
